wording: At the recorded revision, the foundation policy validator accepts the repository-controlled Gate 0 records.

language_edition.reason: No Orange language edition exists during Gate 0.

crypto_profile.reason: This claim concerns repository records, not cryptographic behavior.

target_profile.reason: This claim does not concern generated target code.

leakage_model.reason: This claim makes no leakage assertion.

exclusions: Acceptance is not proof that the policy content is complete or correct.
This claim makes no product, compiler, proof-kernel, or release assurance statement.

basis.note: The fixture uses synthetic digests and demonstrates record shape only.

triggers: Any change to a foundation schema or repository-policy validator

notes: Representative conformance fixture; not an authoritative project claim.
